Hi! I'm **Aicon AI** 🛍️

I can help you:

- **Discover deals** across all categories
- **Answer questions** about shipping, returns & policies
- **Give personalized recommendations** based on your preferences

What are you looking for today?

buyerProtection.title: Your security is our top priority
buyerProtection.description: Every transaction on Aicon X is protected. If you don't receive your item or it's not as described, we've got you covered.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I track my order?
faq.a1: You can track your order by visiting the 'Orders' page in your profile and clicking on the specific order. You'll see real-time updates and a tracking number if applicable.
faq.a2: We offer a 14-day return policy for most items. If you're not satisfied, you can initiate a return from the 'Order Detail' page. Items must be in their original condition.
faq.q3: How do I become a vendor?
faq.a3: Simply go to 'My Store' in the navigation menu and follow the setup instructions. You'll need to provide some basic information and verify your identity.
faq.a4: Yes, all payments are processed through secure, encrypted gateways like ITEC Pay. We never store your full card details on our servers.
